description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) dealing with pager fatigue from frequent 1-minute CPU micro-bursts on EC2 and RDS instances. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Alert Noise Reduction' that mathematically filters out transient spikes to show sustained high load. The dashboard must contain three graphs: 'Sustained EC2 Load (>85%)' targeting servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.* with the logic removeBelowValue(movingAverage(..., 5), 85); 'Sustained RDS Load (>60%)' targeting servers.rds_database.cpu.utilization with the logic removeBelowValue(movingAverage(..., 4), 60); and a diagnostic graph titled 'Instance 1 Noise Differential' using diffSeries(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, movingAverage(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, 5)) to show the amount of noise suppressed for instance 1. Save the dashboard when complete.
